metadata.title: Fast Food | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered fast food management platform for all your quick service operations — from self-ordering kiosks and kitchen management to inventory and loyalty programs.

hero.title: 🍔 Fast Food
hero.description: AdonERP covers everything from self-ordering kiosks and kitchen management to inventory and staff, all in one seamless platform.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP helped us achieve our goals while expanding, by reducing costs by approximately 10%, increasing employee productivity by 50%, and massively improving the decision-making process.

kioskSection.title: Self-ordering at
kioskSection.subtitle: the kiosk
kioskSection.description: Let customers place and pay for their orders directly from the kiosk. They can browse meals, choose extras, and enjoy a faster ordering experience.

serviceSection.title: Smooth service
serviceSection.description: Seamless order preparation and kitchen display keep staff aligned with orders so they can prepare meals exactly on time.

rewardsSection.title: Tasty rewards
rewardsSection.description: Keep your customers coming back with loyalty programs, coupons, discounts and promotional rewards.

inventorySection.title: Never ever run
inventorySection.description: Smart replenishment strategies let AdonERP propose or trigger purchase orders automatically.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Everything needed to run fast food ordering, payments, stock management, and service from one platform.

list.title: Loyalty programs
list.description: Reward repeat customers with points, discounts, and exclusive offers.

list.title: Combo meals
list.description: Create meal bundles and special offers to increase average order value.

list.title: Self-ordering
list.description: Let customers place orders directly from kiosks or QR codes.

list.title: Payment provider
list.description: Accept multiple payment methods including cards and digital wallets.

list.title: Plan your service
list.description: Schedule staff shifts and optimize kitchen operations.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your fast food operation, inventory, customer management, and financials.

testimonials.name: Maria Gonzalez
testimonials.content: AdonERP helped us achieve our goals while expanding, by reducing costs by approximately 10%, increasing employee productivity by 50%, and massively improving the decision-making process.

testimonials.name: David Kim
testimonials.content: The self-ordering kiosks and kitchen display system transformed our operations. Customers love the speed, and our team stays perfectly synchronized.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for fast food and quick service restaurants.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a fast food management workflow that helps your team serve faster, manage inventory smarter, and scale from one location to many.
